title: Taupo Hot Pools for Families — AC Baths vs Thermal Explorer
meta_desc: Discover the best hot pools in Taupo for families, including prices and facilities
intro: Taupo is a haven for families seeking a relaxing getaway, with numerous hot pool options to choose from. The AC Baths and Thermal Explorer Highway are two popular choices, but which one is best for your family? With prices starting from $10 per person, it's essential to weigh your options carefully.

sections.heading: Introduction to Taupo Hot Pools
sections.body: Taupo is situated in the centre of the North Island, approximately a 3-hour drive from Auckland and 4.5 hours from Wellington. The region boasts a range of geothermal hot pools, each offering a unique experience for families. From the popular AC Baths to the more secluded spots along the Thermal Explorer Highway, there's something for every family to enjoy.

sections.heading: AC Baths
sections.body: The AC Baths are a favourite among locals and tourists alike, featuring a range of hot pools, a hydro slide, and a dedicated kids' area. Prices start at $15 per adult and $10 per child (5-15 years), with family passes available for $45. The AC Baths are open from 7:30 am to 9:30 pm, making it an excellent option for families with varying schedules.

sections.heading: Thermal Explorer Highway
sections.body: The Thermal Explorer Highway is a 130km scenic route that winds its way through the Taupo region, offering access to numerous hot pools and geothermal wonders. Families can explore the Wairakei Terraces, Craters of the Moon, and the Orakei Korako Geothermal Park, among others. With so many options to choose from, it's essential to plan your itinerary carefully to make the most of your time.

rows: Hot pools, hydro slide, kids' area

sections.heading: Free and Paid Options
list: Kuirau Park: a free geothermal park with hot pools and walking trails
Taupo Hot Springs: a paid hot pool option with prices starting at $10 per person
Spa Thermal Park: a paid hot pool option with prices starting at $20 per person

sections.heading: Planning Your Trip
sections.body: When planning your trip to Taupo, consider the time of year, accommodation options, and activities for your family. With so many hot pools to choose from, it's essential to prioritize your preferences and budget. Be sure to check the opening hours, prices, and facilities for each location to ensure a smooth and enjoyable experience.

sections.heading: Getting the Most Out of Your Trip
